message:
feat: add detectStaleWorkingDogs to catch dogs stuck in working state with idle sessions

Closes the gap between cleanupStuckDogs (dead session) and reapIdleDogs (idle state).
Dogs in state=working with last_active > 2 hours are cleared and their sessions killed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
